articles.title: Weak-to-Strong Generalization via Direct On-Policy Distillation
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is a powerful recipe for improving language-model reasoning, but it is expensive to repeat on every new strong model because the target model must generate many rollouts during training. articles.summary: 研究弱到强泛化：在较小模型上运行RLVR（可验证奖励强化学习），再将策略蒸馏至强模型，避免强模型大量rollout开销。实验表明该方法在推理任务上接近直接RL效果，显著降低训练成本。

articles.title: RynnWorld-4D: 4D Embodied World Models for Robotic Manipulation
articles.excerpt: Robotic manipulation in the open world requires not only recognizing what a scene looks like, but also anticipating how its 3D structure moves under interaction. We argue that synchronized RGB, depth, and optical flow, namely RGB-DF, provide a physically grounded representation that captures the underlying 4D dynamics of a scene. Compared to 2D pixel videos, this multi-modal synergy aligns visual
articles.summary: 提出RynnWorld-4D，利用同步RGB、深度与光流（RGB-DF）作为物理基元表示，捕捉场景4D动态。该多模态表征增强机器人对3D结构交互的预测能力，适用于开放世界操作任务。

articles.title: RynnWorld-Teleop: An Action-Conditioned World Model for Digital Teleoperation
articles.excerpt: Scaling robot learning requires massive, diverse trajectory data, yet collection is currently bottlenecked by physical teleoperation, where every demonstration binds operator time to specific hardware and workspaces. articles.summary: 提出数字遥操作范式：用生成式世界模型替代真实机器人，解耦数据采集与物理硬件。操作者在虚拟模型上演示轨迹，大幅提升机器人学习数据收集的规模与多样性。

articles.title: AlayaWorld: Long-Horizon and Playable Video World Generation

articles.title: SWE-Review: Closing the Loop on Issue Resolution with Agentic Code Review
articles.excerpt: Coding agents increasingly generate pull requests (PRs) for real-world software issues, yet one-shot PR generation remains open-loop: the PR is proposed without systematic review, diagnosis, or revision. We introduce SWE-Review, a framework for closing this loop with agentic code review. Given an issue and an AI-generated PR, a reviewer agent explores the repository, decides whether the PR should
articles.summary: SWE-Review框架引入智能体代码审查：针对AI生成的PR，审查智能体探索仓库并决定是否接受、修订或拒绝。闭环机制提升代码解决实际issue的准确性与鲁棒性。

articles.title: TurnOPD: Making On-Policy Distillation Turn-Aware for Efficient Long-Horizon Agent Training
articles.excerpt: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains a student policy by matching a stronger teacher on the student's own trajectories, offering a promising framework for language agent training. articles.summary: 提出LLM-as-a-Verifier通用验证框架，将“验证能力”作为新缩放轴。通过细粒度正确性判断增强大模型输出质量，可与预训练、后训练及测试时计算互补。

articles.summary: GaP提出“图即策略”多智能体自学习框架，结合可解释的机器人编程与模型无关策略的开放性，专门处理变体自动化任务中物体几何与位姿的大变化。
